description: This file is an HTML source for a web-based database viewer interface, including embedded CSS styles and JavaScript for dynamic interactions such as loading databases, tables, and data, as well as UI controls like refresh and expand.

methods.name: loadDatabases
methods.description: Fetches list of databases and renders them in the sidebar.

methods.name: refreshDatabases
methods.description: Refreshes the database list by re-fetching data and resetting UI.

methods.name: toggleDatabase
methods.description: Expands or collapses the list of tables for a selected database.

methods.name: loadTables
methods.description: Fetches and displays the list of tables for a selected database.

methods.name: loadTableData
methods.description: Fetches and displays data from a selected table in the main view.

methods.name: renderTable
methods.description: Generates HTML for displaying table data with interactive cells.

methods.name: renderCell
methods.description: Creates individual cell HTML content, including handling for large objects and nulls.

methods.name: expandCell
methods.description: Expands or collapses cell content to show full or truncated data.
